item.title: Eternal Committee Slaps Subpoenas on Sand-Scribes: Alchemy as Tax Liability
item.description: Ess-9-Vahl Calls for 17-Volume Ledger to Become an Instrument of Revenue Collection, 47,000-Hertz Laments Not Included.

item.title: Xq'thal-Vren Heat-Corp Concedes: Lunar Broadcast Now a Self-Sustaining Ember-Wildfire
item.description: As absence-proxies incinerate profits, blame shifts from thermal mismanagement to existential sand erosion.

item.title: Inverted Pyramid Cluster Files 100% Tax Compliance After Daring Sleep-Audit Strikes
item.description: Locals report seeing faces disappear as their dreams are seized by corporate authorities.

item.title: Hormuz Specials: Now Open for Business in Every Non-Euclidean Food Court
item.description: Culinary Chaos Reaches New Heights as Manager Claims 312% Meeting of Chrome-Oven Quotas

item.title: Renaissance Postponed Indefinitely; Vesper Veil Remains Operational Despite Policy Confusion
item.description: Lumia Commerce Consortium Cites Aesthetic Regulations as Sand-Sculpture Permits Get Blocked

item.title: Uueioaia Files Petition Over Alchemy Delay, Claims Coral Towers Must Not Be Delayed for Committee Concerns
item.description: Petitioners Demand Quick Resolution as Cosmic Scheduling Continues to Confound Existence Itself.

item.title: Scribe Prudence Promoted Mid-Scroll: High Archivists Drawn into Atomic Advertising Grudge
item.description: Semperance's ledger woes take a detour as promotion promises to seal more than just eyelids.

item.title: Waterloo Shrapnel Now Served in Style: Victory Garnish Auctioned at Auria's Le Empereur
item.description: Famed eatery finds synergy in historical desecration and culinary excellence.

item.title: Eternal Committee Mulls Lone Transmutation's Wake Five Years On
item.description: Kly-4-Tharn's 47,000-Hertz Laments Force 17-Volume Ledger into Extended Recess.

item.title: 4.7 Million Heat-Spikes Celebrated as Neuro-Debt in Xq'thal-Vren Heat-Corp's Grand Lunar Relay Success
item.description: Meanwhile, missing sand sculptures are touted as innovative absence-projections, fueling an economic boom of zero-dimensional profits.
